description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular external hard drive with a textured, geometric pattern on its top surface. The casing is made of glossy black plastic, with subtle ridges and a central logo or design element. One side features multiple ports, including USB and possibly power or data connectors, as well as indicator lights. A single cable extends from one end, terminating in a USB connector, indicating its function as a data storage device. The overall build is sleek and modern, with a low profile and rounded edges. Its size and design suggest it is intended for desktop or portable use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black external hard drive with a textured top, multiple ports, and a USB cable for data connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main port panel with USB and indicator lights, and the attached cable.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cable attachment and the geometric pattern on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying all available ports and connectors, as well as the cable extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the cable and the patterned top, with no visible ports.
